privileged_info_summary: The Android Studio project is synthetically generated via setup scripts at /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/VideoPlayerApp. The target local video resource is named promo_video and explicitly downloaded as an MP4 by the setup script. The expected Media3 dependencies required for ExoPlayer are androidx.media3:media3-exoplayer and androidx.media3:media3-ui, which exactly matches the export and verifier script checks.
